task_completion.description: Page 1 includes the title 'Lewis Dot Structures', the text 'Covalent Bonding', and a definition of the Octet Rule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main canvas or page browser thumbnails for a page containing the text 'Lewis Dot Structures', 'Covalent Bonding', and a definition mentioning the 'Octet Rule' (or 8 valence electrons).

task_completion.description: Page 2 includes the title 'Valence Electrons' and the element symbols H, C, N, O, and Cl with dots representing their valence electrons.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page titled 'Valence Electrons' containing the letters H, C, N, O, and Cl. Each letter should have dots around it representing valence electrons (H: 1, C: 4, N: 5, O: 6, Cl: 7).

task_completion.description: Page 3 includes the title 'Water (H2O)' and a Lewis structure drawing for water.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page titled 'Water (H2O)' containing a diagram of a water molecule (an O atom connected to two H atoms, with dots representing the 4 non-bonding electrons on the Oxygen).

task_completion.description: Page 4 includes the title 'Practice' and lists the molecules CO2, NH3, and CH4.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page titled 'Practice' that contains the text 'CO2', 'NH3', and 'CH4'.

task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved as 'lewis_dot_structures.flipchart' in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the ActivInspire window title bar for the filename 'lewis_dot_structures.flipchart', or a save dialog showing the file being saved to the '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ActivInspire application open with the flipchart being edited on the canvas, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent manually added dots or shapes for the valence electrons.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of shapes (like circles or dots) or text characters being placed around the element symbols on the canvas.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's save functionality to save the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog box in ActivInspire being used to specify the filename and directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 4-page ActivInspire flipchart saved to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/lewis_dot_structures.flipchart. Page 1: Title 'Lewis Dot Structures', text 'Covalent Bonding', and Octet Rule definition (mentioning 8 valence electrons). Page 2: Title 'Valence Electrons', showing element symbols H, C, N, O, and Cl with dots representing valence electrons (H=1, C=4, N=5, O=6, Cl=7). Page 3: Title 'Water (H2O)', showing Lewis structure for water (H-O-H with 2 lone pairs on O). Page 4: Title 'Practice', listing molecules CO2, NH3, CH4. Minimum 10 shapes (electron dots) should be present across the document.
